title: Clockodo Time Entry
description: Schema for a Clockodo time-tracking entry. An entry records time spent by a user on a customer/project/service combination, optionally with billable status, hourly rate, and free-text description. Entries underpin reporting, invoicing, and project-budget tracking in Clockodo.

users_id.description: ID of the user who recorded the entry.

customers_id.description: ID of the customer associated with the entry.

projects_id.description: ID of the project the entry is booked against.

time_until.description: End time of the entry. Null when the entry is still being timed by the stop-clock.

duration.description: Duration of the entry in seconds.

text.description: Free-text description of the work performed.

lumpsum.description: Lump-sum amount when the entry is billed as a flat fee instead of by time.
